label: 310_served_assistant secretary_assistant_counsel
description: The U.S. Department of the Treasury announced key appointments for senior positions, including James Bacon as Senior Advisor and John Crews as Deputy Assistant Secretary for Financial Institutions Policy, highlighting the department's commitment to economic recovery and financial system strengthening.

earliest_articles.title: Treasury Names Two Appointees to AIG’S Board of Directors
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) TG-623 The U.S. Department of the Treasury today exercised its right to appoint two directors to the American International Group, Inc. (AIG) board of directors, naming Donald H. Layton and Ronald A. Rittenmeyer as directors. Treasury had the right to appoint these directors because AIG failed to…

earliest_articles.title: Treasury Names Appointee to Ally Board of Directors
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) TG-720 WASHINGTON - The U.S. Department of the Treasury today exercised its right to appoint the first of two directors to the Ally Financial Inc. (Ally) board of directors, naming Marjorie Magner. Formerly GMAC Financial Services Inc., Ally is a recipient of the Obama Administration's Automotive…

earliest_articles.title: Secretary Geithner Announces that John G. Walsh Will Become Acting Comptroller of the Currency
earliest_articles.excerpt: (Archived Content) TG-787 WASHINGTON - Today, U.S. Treasury Secretary Tim Geithner announced that, when Comptroller of the Currency John C. Dugan leaves office on August 14, John G. Walsh will become Acting Comptroller of the Currency. Mr. Walsh currently serves as Chief of Staff and Public Affairs for the Office of…

newest_articles.title: Treasury Department Announces New Appointment
newest_articles.excerpt: WASHINGTON — Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent announced today the key appointment of Kate Tyrrell to serve as Treasury Chief of Staff. newest_articles.title: United States Department of the Treasury Announces Key Nomination
newest_articles.excerpt: WASHINGTON – Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent announced today President Trump’s intent to nominate G. Hunter McMaster II to serve as Assistant Secretary for Financial Markets. newest_articles.title: United States Department of the Treasury Announces Key Nomination
newest_articles.excerpt: WASHINGTON – Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent announced today President Trump’s intent to nominate Erin Browne to serve as the Under Secretary for International Affairs at the U.S. Department of the Treasury. central_articles.title: Treasury Department Announces New Appointments
central_articles.excerpt: WASHINGTON – Secretary of the Treasury Scott Bessent announced today key appointments for senior positions at the U.S. Department of the Treasury. central_articles.title: Treasury Announces Appointment of Several Members of Staff
central_articles.excerpt: WASHINGTON – Today, the United States Department of the Treasury announced the appointment of new members of key staff. This diverse and deeply experienced team is prepared to deliver results for the American people by getting the economy back on track, strengthening the financial system, and restoring jobs.…
